text.title: Shadow Handover Session Decision Tree
text.summary: Tree mapping observable signals (outgoing-availability, task-list readiness, drive verdicts, sign-off captured, spf items) to run / second-session / forensic-fallback.

decision-tree.root-question: outgoing_engineer available and willing for at least one session?

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology; use forensic-handover artefacts (postmortems, runbooks, code-archaeology)

branch.question: task_list with at least 5 representative ops tasks ready?

conclusion.verdict: defer; agree task list with both parties before scheduling session

branch.question: every task in this session has receiver_drove == true OR verdict == deferred?

conclusion.verdict: reject session record; schedule second session; outgoing engineer cannot drive non-recovery tasks
reject record; schedule sign-off slot; rotation date gated
defer rotation date until SPF items have doc_link OR second-session scheduled
accept record; convert open gap-log items to doc tickets within 1 week

text.example: outgoing=available → task_list=5 tasks → all drove or deferred → both signed → spf list empty → accept; open gap_log items → doc tickets.
